headline: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade Rolls Out Crypto Trading. Wall Street’s Push Into Digital Assets Continues.
summary: Eligible E*Trade customers will be able to purchase crypto assets through a linked account at crypto infrastructure firm zerohash for a fee of 0.5% of assets traded.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade Rolls Out Crypto Trading. Wall Street’s Push Into Digital Assets Continues.

headline: A 1950s Stock Checklist Just Predicted AI’s Regulatory Reckoning in 2026
summary: On the July 16 episode of The Investing for Beginners Podcast, co-host Stephen Morris drew a hard line around AI stocks, arguing investors should stay away from anything the government will regulate. His logic borrows from a 1950 Barron’s checklist written by T. Rowe Price, which warned investors away from companies furnishing necessities of life ...
